description: CompositionRed and blue checked shirt with white accents, made of 100% cotton, is half-sleeved with a chest pocket on the left, a full length buttoned placket and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsChecks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
